name: Sprayed Plaster Calculator
seo_description: Calculate sprayed plaster consumption per m², total kg and 25kg bags needed. Free construction calculator.
example_label: Calculate sprayed plaster for 50m² of wall with 15mm thickness.

range_hints.area: Total area to plaster (deduct openings if desired)

result_context: For {area} m² at {thickness_mm}mm thickness: {kg_total} kg of sprayed plaster ({sacos_25kg} bags of 25kg). Consumption: {kg_m2} kg/m².
formula_display: Consumption = Thickness(mm) x 1.5 kg/m²/mm; Total = Area x Consumption
steps: Calculate consumption per m²: 15mm × 1.5 kg/m²/mm = 22.5 kg/m²
Calculate total without waste: 50m² × 22.5 kg/m² = 1125 kg
mistakes: Not preparing the surface properly (cleaning, dampening)
Applying excessive thickness in a single coat (may detach)
Not accounting for waste from rebound in mechanical projection
description: Sprayed Plaster Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Sprayed Plaster Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
